block_01: There are two primary ways to analyze the asset you are about to trade: fundamental and technical. Fundamental concentrates on the asset itself, while technical only pays attention to its past price performance.
block_02: In this article we try to find out — once and for all — which one is better. The result might surprise you!
block_04: Trading With Alligator — A Trend-Craving Carnivore
block_05: An all time classic, Alligator is a technical analysis indicator that every trader should try. It is simple, it is versatile and it can become an invaluable addition to your trading strategy.
block_08: Some basics of Forex trading may require an additional explanation, such as the concept of quotes. Everything you need to know about Bid and Ask is in this article.
